/usr/bin/c++  -DSIMDE_X86_AVX_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_AVX_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_F16C_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_FMA_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_GFNI_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_MMX_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_PCLMUL_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_SSE2_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_SSE3_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_SSE_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_XOP_HAVE_COM_ -DSIMDE_X86_XOP_NATIVE -mno-avx512f -march=native -DSIMDE_X86_AVX2_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_VPCLMULQDQ_NATIVE -march=native  -pipe -fPIC -Wall -fno-strict-aliasing -rdynamic -Wno-packed-bitfield-compat -std=c++11  -O2 -g   -ggdb2 -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/home/zyzy/zy-OAI CMakeFiles/dlsim_tm4.dir/openair1/SIMULATION/LTE_PHY/dlsim_tm4.c.o CMakeFiles/dlsim_tm4.dir/openair1/PHY/TOOLS/lte_phy_scope_tm4.c.o -o dlsim_tm4  -Wl,--start-group libSIMU.a libUTIL.a libSCHED_LIB.a libSCHED_RU_LIB.a libPHY.a libITTI.a -Wl,--end-group -lpthread -lm -lrt libCONFIG_LIB.a common/utils/T/libT.a common/utils/LOG/libLOG.a common/utils/threadPool/libthread-pool.a common/utils/libutils.a common/utils/actor/libactor.a libUTIL.a libCONFIG_LIB.a common/utils/T/libT.a common/utils/LOG/libLOG.a common/utils/threadPool/libthread-pool.a common/utils/libutils.a common/utils/actor/libactor.a common/utils/barrier/libbarrier.a -lpthread -ldl -lrt
